subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! the servant in attendance hath appeared and laid before Us that which was in thy letter. We have hearkened unto it and made reply unto thee. Rejoice thou and be of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قد حضر العبد الحاضر و عرض ما فی کتابک سمعناه و اجبناک ان افرح و کن من
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @prayer for healing, @law of fasting, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
